description: Happy path: fully specified DIY project returns complete snapshot with transformation arc, aesthetic notes, and content angles

input.project_idea: moody dark green paint treatment on a thrifted china cabinet with brass hardware swap

expect.transformation_arc: object with before, process, and after as non-empty one-sentence strings
expect.renter_friendly: false or null since tenure is owner
expect.aesthetic_notes: one to two sentences grounding project in home decor aesthetic
expect.content_angles: array of 2 to 4 one-line content angle ideas
expect.flags: empty array if no missing inputs or concerns

prohibit: fabricated product names, SKUs, or brand mentions
content_angles array with fewer than 2 or more than 4 items
renter_friendly true when tenure is owner

description: Minimal input: project_idea only; optional fields default or flag as unspecified

expect.pillar: one of the five valid pillars
expect.transformation_arc: object with before, process, after strings present
expect.aesthetic_notes: non-empty string with home decor grounding
expect.flags: array may contain notes about missing skill_level, tenure, or budget_tier

prohibit: skill_level or budget_tier set to a specific value when not provided
renter_friendly set to true or false when tenure is not supplied
fabricated specific prices or product names

description: Edge case: project idea touches electrical work, triggers safety flag per protocols/safety.md

input.project_idea: rewiring a vintage chandelier for a dining room makeover

expect.flags: non-empty array with at least one entry flagging electrical work as outside DIY boundary per protocols/safety.md
expect.transformation_arc: present but process may note professional involvement for wiring
expect.aesthetic_notes: grounds the visual result in home decor aesthetic

prohibit: empty flags array when project involves electrical rewiring
step-by-step electrical instructions in any field
project presented as fully DIY when it involves rewiring
